query:
SELECT tier, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM campaignContacts GROUP BY tier ORDER BY tier;
SELECT titleRelevance, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM campaignContacts GROUP BY titleRelevance ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT tier, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM campaignContacts GROUP BY tier ORDER BY tier;
SELECT titleRelevance, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM campaignContacts GROUP BY titleRelevance ORDER BY cnt DESC;
